{
  "claims": [
    "A 2019 study by the National Association of Realtors highlights Bakersfield as a popular real estate market for millennials to purchase a home.",
    "The study identifies job market and affordability as the main factors that millennials consider when purchasing a home.",
    "Kern County is characterized by diverse industries, including agriculture, oil, aerospace, and defense.",
    "Eastern Kern County is home to two military installations: the Naval Air Weapons Station at China Lake and Edwards Air Force Base.",
    "The aerospace and defense industries contribute to the robust economy and workforce of Kern County.",
    "53% of Californians are considering leaving the state, with the number rising to 63% among millennials."
  ]
}
